name: Pita Pizza Wedges
recipeIngredient: 2 fresh basil leaves, cut into thin strips
1/2 cucumber, cut in half, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven's broiler.
2. Place the pita on a baking sheet and slice it completely around to form two circles. Set the top round aside. Lay the turkey slices over the pita bottom, then add tomato slices and basil. Arrange cucumber pieces over the basil before sprinkling with cheese.
3. Broil for approximately 7 minutes until the cheese melts.
4. Turn off the broiler and place the pita top back on. Cut into wedges and wrap for the lunch box.
